Hero.title: Product Designer
Hero.description: passionate about creating intuitive digital experiences that connect users with value.
Hero.trustedBy: Trusted by happy clients across residential and commercial projects.

About.headline: focus is on blending clear strategy, thoughtful design, and user empathy to
About.highlightedText: craft experiences that solve real problems

Process.title: Here's how it works
Process.subtitle: A clear process, tangible deliverables. No surprises.

step1.title: We talk
step1.description: A conversation to understand your project, goals and users. I ask the right questions to scope things clearly.
step1.deliverable: Structured brief and a clear proposal for what comes next

step2.title: I design & build
step2.description: Figma mockups and visual directions we refine together, then implementation: clean, responsive, performance-minded code. You follow progress on a preview link.
step2.deliverable: Signed-off design, navigable prototype, and a site ready to go live

step3.title: I support you
step3.description: Go-live, handover and follow-up after delivery. I stay available as the project evolves.
step3.deliverable: Deployed site, practical notes for day-to-day use, and helpful documentation
